altitude-m.description: Observed altitude in meters (reference according to the chosen profile).

auth-claim.description: Identity assurance hint associated with the RID data (for example DRIP or local signature checks).

broadcast-tech.description: Physical broadcast technology used by direct RID.

comment.description: Free-text analyst notes about this observation.

confidence.description: Analyst confidence score from 0 to 100 for correctness and attribution of the RID observation.

emergency-status.description: Emergency or abnormal status reported by RID.

height-reference.description: Reference used for the reported height or altitude.

latitude.description: Observed drone latitude in decimal degrees (WGS84).

longitude.description: Observed drone longitude in decimal degrees (WGS84).

observation-time.description: Timestamp when the direct remote identification broadcast was observed.

operator-id.description: Operator identifier if present in the RID data.

operator-latitude.description: Operator or control-station latitude when available in the RID message.

operator-longitude.description: Operator or control-station longitude when available in the RID message.

raw-message.description: Raw RID payload or decoded fragment for forensic re-processing.

receiver-id.description: Identifier of the sensor, handset, or probe collecting this RID observation.

rid-standard-profile.description: Regulatory or technical profile used by the observed broadcast RID message.

session-id.description: Session or message set identifier used to correlate RID messages belonging to the same flight.

speed-mps.description: Observed horizontal speed in meters per second.

uas-id.description: Unmanned aircraft identifier as observed in the RID payload (serial number, CAA-issued identifier, or equivalent).

description: Simple direct remote identification (RID) observation object for drones/UAS, covering common ASTM/FAA and EU broadcast fields with optional DRIP-oriented identity assurance hints.
name: drone-rid-observation
